body: Hey Amara, following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to circle back on the [Verdant Grid](startups/verdant-grid) deal now that their Series A terms are a bit clearer. I know you mentioned Halfway had strong conviction on the grid-edge AI angle, and from what I'm seeing in the updated deck, they've meaningfully de-risked the hardware dependency question that was hanging over the round. Accel is likely coming in as lead, but we'd love to have a co-investor with your specific climate infrastructure lens alongside us given how operationally heavy this one is going to be. Would you have 20 minutes early next week to sync on whether the allocation math works on your end? Happy to share the data room access in the meantime if that helps you move faster internally.
